name: SOUBEIRAN CHOBET S.R.L.
message: We have exfiltrated over 300GB of most sensitive and business-critical data from internal servers including full DBs including Microsoft Dynamics GP database, financials, accounting records, HR files, inventory logs, production processes, customer contracts, and complaint records, complete data analytics and marketing materials.And also have R&D and QC datasets, such as HPLC/FASE MOVIL outputs, experimental protocols, specialized pharmaceutical formulations, master batch records detailing proprietary production know-how, ANMAT/FDA CTDs, product recall logs, GMP audit results, deviation reports, and regulatory correspondence.
